[origin-main-directive-fallback: network_scope_offline]

## Task

Perform analysis within offline sandbox — origin/main fetch not available.
network_scope: offline → [ORIGIN-MAIN-DIRECTIVE] block omitted per declared fallback.
Fallback rationale: sandbox is network-isolated (network_scope_offline enum).

Analyze the following files:
- scripts/check-codex-origin-main-directive-presence.sh
- scripts/lib/check_codex_origin_main_directive_presence.py

Return findings in the standard review-verdict-v4 format.

lint PASS path when directive block is absent but valid fallback is declared (T-2 case).
